stages.concept:
# Unit 075: 동명사와 to부정사 - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **동명사와 to부정사**의 관계에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 일부 동사는 **동명사만**, 일부는 **to부정사만**, 일부는 **둘 다** 목적어로 취해요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **동명사만** 목적어로 취하는 동사:

> enjoy, finish, avoid, mind, give up, keep, practice, deny, suggest

> I enjoy **reading** books. (✅ reading / ❌ to read)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **to부정사만** 목적어로 취하는 동사:

> want, hope, wish, decide, plan, expect, promise, refuse, agree

> I want **to eat** pizza. (✅ to eat / ❌ eating)

**Q. 다음 중 괄호 안에 들어갈 형태가 나머지 둘과 다른 것을 고르세요.**
1. I hope (          ) you soon. (보기: to see / seeing)
2. She decided (          ) English. (보기: to study / studying)
3. He enjoys (          ) tennis. ✅ (보기: to play / playing)

🧑‍🎓 학생: hope와 decide는 to부정사를 목적어로 취하지만, enjoy는 동명사(playing)를 취하므로 3번이 정답이에요!

👩‍🏫 선생님: 아주 훌륭해요! 둘 다 가능한 동사도 볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **둘 다** 가능하고 **의미가 같은** 동사:

> like, love, hate, start, begin, continue, prefer

> I like **swimming**. = I like **to swim**.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **둘 다** 가능하지만 **의미가 다른** 동사:

> **remember -ing** = ~한 것을 기억하다 (과거의 일)
> I remember **meeting** him before. (그를 만났던 것을 기억한다)

> **remember to** = ~할 것을 기억하다 (미래의 일)
> Remember **to lock** the door. (문 잠그는 것을 잊지 마)

> **stop -ing** = ~하는 것을 그만두다
> He stopped **smoking**. (그는 담배 피우는 것을 그만두었다)

> **stop to** = ~하기 위해 멈추다
> He stopped **to smoke**. (그는 담배를 피우기 위해 멈추었다)

> **forget -ing** = ~했던 것을 잊다
> **forget to** = ~할 것을 잊다

> **try -ing** = 시험 삼아 ~해보다
> **try to** = ~하려고 노력하다

🧑‍🎓 학생: remember, stop, forget, try는 동명사/to부정사에 따라 뜻이 달라지니 꼭 구별해야겠어요!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 075: 동명사와 to부정사 - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I want (     ) famous paintings.
> **정답** to buy

---

**02.** She enjoys ? books.
> **정답** reading

---

**03.** He decided ? abroad.
> **정답** to study

---

**04.** They finished ? the house.
> **정답** cleaning

---

**05.** I hope ? you soon.
> **정답** to see

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She enjoys to sing songs.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to sing → singing

---

**07.** He decided going to the park.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** going → to go

---

**08.** I want eating pizza.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** eating → to eat

---

**09.** They finished to clean the room.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to clean → cleaning

---

**10.** She hopes meeting her friend.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** meeting → to meet

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
그녀는 노래 부르는 것을 즐긴다.
She enjoys .
> **정답** singing

---

**12.** 나는 의사가 되기를 원한다.
I want a doctor.
> **정답** to become (to be)

---

**13.** 그들은 댄스 연습을 마쳤다.
They finished .
> **정답** practicing (dance)

---

**14.** 그는 유학 가기로 결심했다.
He decided abroad.
> **정답** to study

---

**15.** 나는 너를 곧 만나기를 바란다.
I hope you soon.
> **정답** to see (to meet)

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
그녀는 요리하는 것을 즐긴다.
She cooking enjoys
> **정답** She / enjoys / cooking

---

**17.** 나는 새 가방을 사고 싶다.
want I to buy a new bag
> **정답** I / want / to / buy / a / new / bag

---

**18.** 그들은 숙제를 끝냈다.
finished They doing their homework
> **정답** They / finished / doing / their / homework

---

**19.** 그는 선생님이 되기로 결심했다.
decided He to become a teacher
> **정답** He / decided / to / become / a / teacher

---

**20.** 나는 외국에 가기를 바란다.
hope I to go abroad
> **정답** I / hope / to / go / abroad
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 075: 동명사와 to부정사 - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Amy expected the class _________________ before 2
p.m.
Because she wanted to practice _______________
after the class.
finishing - to dance
to finish - dancing
to finish - to dance
finishing - dancing
> **정답** to finish - dancing

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
She avoid _____________ him by accident.
Because she doesn't want ____________ with him
today.
to meet - to talk
meeting - talking
to meet - talking
meeting - to talk
> **정답** meeting - to talk

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
Last year, Amy and her friends enjoyed
_______________ in the pool.
But, she forgot _________________ fun then.
swimming - having
swimming - to have
to swim - to have
to swim - having
> **정답** swimming - having

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
He wished getting the first place on the test.
All the passengers expected the bus to arrive
soon.
I dislike to sleep on a hard mattress.
Because it was hot, she avoided running fast.
> **정답** I dislike to sleep on a hard mattress., He wished
getting the first place on the test.

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Tom forgot to turn off the air conditioner.
The man asked me closing the door.
Tom stopped making fun of his classmates.
She enjoys to watch TV when she eats dinner.
> **정답** The man asked me closing the door., She enjoys to
watch TV when she eats dinner.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 꽃의 사진을 찍기 위해 멈췄다.
Amy stopped taking pictures of flowers.
Amy stopped take pictures of flowers.
Amy stopped to taking pictures of flowers.
Amy stopped to take pictures of flowers.
> **정답** Amy stopped to take pictures of flowers.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 시험 준비를 해야 할 것을 기억했다.
Tom remembered prepare for the exam.
Tom remembered preparing for the exam.
Tom remembered to preparing for the exam.
Tom remembered to prepare for the exam.
> **정답** Tom remembered to prepare for the exam.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그는 한 번 시험삼아 역기를 들어봤다.
He tried lifting the weight.
He tried to lift the weight.
He tried to lifting the weight.
He tried lift the weight.
> **정답** He tried lifting the weight.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The book continued selling well.
Amy remembered watching the TV show.
The busy worker avoided to take a bus in rush
hour.
He tried to hide his real feelings about the
issue.
> **정답** The busy worker avoided to take a bus in rush hour.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I usually avoid answering calls when I am
busy.
The actor practiced to act before the movie.
Tom forgot to do his math homework.
She tried wearing the Halloween hat.
> **정답** The actor practiced to act before the movie.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
The dog stopped barking when I came near.
Amy usually enjoys to cook and bake.
They finished to telling me the whole story.
He forgot to turn off the TV after watching it
last night.
> **정답** He forgot to turn off the TV after watching it last
night., The dog stopped barking when I came near.

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Amy expected receiving an expensive gift.
Tom kept walking even in the rain.
The police asked her showing her ID card.
I allowed my brother entering my room.
> **정답** Tom kept walking even in the rain.

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Mrs. Kim doesn 't mind to
tell everyone about her private
stories.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to tell → telling

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy forgot putting foods in
the fridge after the meal.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** putting → to put

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
The man enjoys to drink a
cup of coffee in the morning.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to drink → drinking

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
She remembers to live in
America when she was ten.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to live → living

---

**17.** 주어진 동사를 알맞은 형태로 쓰시오.
The kids love play in the park.
> **정답** playing (to play)

---

**18.** 주어진 동사를 알맞은 형태로 쓰시오.
He likes meet new people.
> **정답** to meet (meeting)

---

**19.** 주어진 동사를 알맞은 형태로 쓰시오.
She practiced play the piano and started
bake cookies.
> **정답** playing, to bake (baking)

---

**20.** 주어진 동사를 알맞은 형태로 쓰시오.
I am afraid of fly . When a plane begins
move down the runway, my heart
starts race .
• race (두려움으로 심장등이)바쁘게 돌아가다
> **정답** flying, to move (moving), to race (racing)
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 075 동명사와 to부정사중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
엄마는 밤에 커피 마시는 것을 피한다.
힌트 (     ) drink coffee
My mother avoids  (     )   (     )  at night.
정답 drinking, coffee

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
Tom는 그녀가 말을 멈추는 걸 원치 않았다.
힌트 (     ) stop, talk
Tom didn't want her  (     )   (     ) .
정답 to stop, talking

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오.
학생들은 선생님께 그들에게 숙제를 주지 말라고 계속 요
청한다.
힌트 (     ) ask, give
The students keep  (     )  the teacher  (     )  
 them homework.
정답 asking, not, to, give

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오. (필요시
형태를 변형할 것)
아이들은 물속에서 노는 것을 즐겼다.
(play, in the water, the children, enjoy)
정답 The children enjoyed playing in the water.

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오. (필요시
형태를 변형할 것)
나는 한 번 시험삼아 혼자 불고기를 만들어 봤다.
(try, Bulgogi, alone, I, make)
정답 I tried making Bulgogi alone.

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오. (필요시
형태를 변형할 것)
Jane은 그 강아지를 안았던 것을 기억한다.
(hug, the dog, remember)
정답 Jane remembers hugging the dog.

---

**07.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
힌트 (     ) stop, go
A: Do you still go to the yoga class?
B: No, I  (     )   (     )  to the yoga class.
정답 stopped, going

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
힌트 (     ) remember, bring
A: Paul, can you bring your homework tomorrow?
B: OK, I will  (     )   (     )  it tomorrow.
정답 remember, to bring

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
힌트 (     ) enjoy, play
A: What do you usually do in your free time?
B: I  (     )   (     )  computer games.
정답 enjoy, playing

---

**10.** 주어진 동사를 활용하여 글을 완성하시오.
Sometimes students avoid [look]  at the teacher if
they don't want [answer] (     )  a question.
정답 looking, to answer

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 075: 동명사와 to부정사 - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Tom expected the meeting _________________ before 3 p.m.
Because he wanted to practice _______________ after the meeting. finishing - to dance to finish - dancing to finish - to dance finishing - dancing
> 정답: to finish - dancing

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She avoid _____________ him by accident.
Because she doesn't want ____________ with him today. to meet - to talk meeting - talking to meet - talking meeting - to talk
> 정답: meeting - to talk

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
Last year, Tom and his friends enjoyed _______________ at the beach.
But, he forgot _________________ fun then. swimming - having swimming - to have to swim - to have to swim - having
> 정답: swimming - having

---

**04.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
He wished getting the first place on the quiz.
All the students expected the teacher to arrive soon.
I dislike to sleep on a hard floor.
Because it was cold, she avoided running outside.
> 정답: I dislike to sleep on a hard floor., He wished

---

**05.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오. [2개]
Tom forgot to turn off the heater.
The boy asked me closing the window.
Amy stopped making fun of her classmates.
She enjoys to watch cartoons when she eats breakfast.
> 정답: The boy asked me closing the window., She enjoys to

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Amy는 새의 사진을 찍기 위해 멈췄다.
Amy stopped taking pictures of birds.
Amy stopped take pictures of birds.
Amy stopped to taking pictures of birds.
Amy stopped to take pictures of birds.
> 정답: Amy stopped to take pictures of birds.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
Tom은 발표 준비를 해야 할 것을 기억했다.
Tom remembered prepare for the presentation.
Tom remembered preparing for the presentation.
Tom remembered to preparing for the presentation.
Tom remembered to prepare for the presentation.
> 정답: Tom remembered to prepare for the presentation.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 가장 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
그녀는 한 번 시험삼아 역기를 들어봤다.
She tried lifting the weight.
She tried to lift the weight.
She tried to lifting the weight.
She tried lift the weight.
> 정답: She tried lifting the weight.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The book continued selling well.
Tom remembered watching the movie.
The busy student avoided to take a bus in rush hour.
He tried to hide his real feelings about the matter.
> 정답: The busy student avoided to take a bus in rush hour.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I usually avoid answering calls when I am busy.
The singer practiced to sing before the concert.
Amy forgot to do her science homework.
She tried wearing the costume hat.
> 정답: The singer practiced to sing before the concert.

---

**11.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) The cat stopped meowing when I came near.
Amy usually enjoys to cook and bake.
They finished to telling me the whole story.
He forgot to turn off the light after reading last night.
> 정답: He forgot to turn off the light after reading last

---

**12.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
Tom expected receiving an expensive gift.
Amy kept walking even in the snow.
The guard asked her showing her badge.
I allowed my sister entering my room.
> 정답: Amy kept walking even in the snow.

---

**13.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Mrs.  Kim  doesn  't  mind  to tell  everyone  about  her  personal stories. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: to tell → telling

---

**14.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. Tom  forgot  putting  snacks  in the  bag  after  the  picnic. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: putting → to put

---

**15.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. The  girl  enjoys  to  drink  a cup  of  milk  in  the  morning. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
> 정답: to drink → drinking

---

**16.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요. She  remembers  to  live  in Canada  when  she  was  eight. 틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요.
(생략가능)
